title: Xtra Peppery Argentinian Beef Sandwich
description: A peppery and gooey solo dinner featuring garlic sauce and double rise bread, this low carb friendly Argentinian dish is perfect for a solo evening meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef strips with coarse black pepper and cook for 5 minutes per side.
Butter the double rise bread slices on the outside.
Spread garlic sauce on the inside of the bread slices.
Assemble the sandwiches by placing the grilled beef strips on the bread, then topping with pepper jack cheese, mayonnaise, diced onion, and diced bell pepper.
Place the sandwiches in the grill or grill pan and cook for 2 minutes per side, or until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted.
Let the sandwiches cool for a minute before serving.
